title: Python for Data Teams
description: Hands-on Python fundamentals for data analysts covering pandas, matplotlib, and basic statistical analysis.

title: Advanced SQL Mastery
description: Deep dive into window functions, CTEs, query optimization, and analytics patterns for data professionals.

title: Docker & Kubernetes for Engineers
description: Containerization and orchestration fundamentals for software engineers moving to cloud-native development.

title: System Design Fundamentals
description: Core patterns for designing scalable, reliable distributed systems including caching, load balancing, and database sharding.

title: Engineering Leadership Bootcamp
description: Transition from individual contributor to engineering leader: feedback frameworks, delegation, hiring, and team health.

title: Tableau & Power BI for Analysts
description: Build compelling dashboards and data narratives using industry-standard BI tools.

title: Machine Learning Essentials
description: Practical introduction to supervised learning, model evaluation, and deploying ML models in production.

title: Software Testing & CI/CD
description: Unit testing, integration testing, TDD, and building automated pipelines with GitHub Actions.

title: Project Management for Tech Teams
description: Agile, OKRs, roadmap planning and stakeholder communication for technical team leads and managers.

title: Data-Driven HR & L&D Strategy
description: Using people analytics to measure hiring quality, engagement, retention, and learning ROI.

title: Employment Law & HR Compliance
description: Core employment regulations, onboarding best practices, and HRIS fundamentals for early-career HR professionals.

title: Conflict Resolution & Coaching
description: Evidence-based frameworks for resolving workplace conflict and coaching employees through performance challenges.
